title: OpenLiDARViewer
description: OpenLiDARViewer is an open-source, local-first, browser-native platform for LiDAR and point-cloud inspection, streaming visualization, measurement, terrain analysis, validation, and reproducible reporting. Each release ships with machine-generated test evidence, a release manifest binding the tag to the commit and to every attached artifact's hash, a CycloneDX SBOM, and versioned validation, limitations, and reproducibility documents. Scientific claims are bounded and recorded in a machine-checked claim register; the vocabulary and the claim set are defined in CLAIMS_AND_LIMITATIONS.md.
notes: The author declares no competing interests. Development is self-funded by Aurtech.
